diive.pkgs.corrections.offsetcorrection¶

Functions

remove_radiation_zero_offset(series, lat, ...)

Correct nighttime offset from all radiation data and set nighttime to zero

remove_relativehumidity_offset(series[, ...])

Correct relative humidity offset > 100%

Classes

MeasurementOffsetFromReplicate(measurement, ...)

Compare yearly measurement histograms to reference, detect offset and gain in comparison to reference and correct measurement for offset and gain per year

WindDirOffset(winddir, hist_ref_years[, ...])

Compare yearly wind direction histograms to reference, detect offset in comparison to reference and correct wind directions for offset per year
class diive.pkgs.corrections.offsetcorrection.MeasurementOffsetFromReplicate(measurement, replicate, offset_start=-100, offset_end=100, offset_stepsize=0.1)[source]¶

Bases: object

Compare yearly measurement histograms to reference, detect offset and gain in comparison to reference and correct measurement for offset and gain per year

Example:

See examples/corrections/offsetcorrection.py for complete examples.

Parameters:

  • measurement (Series)

  • replicate (Series)

  • offset_start (int)

  • offset_end (int)

  • offset_stepsize (float)

__init__(measurement, replicate, offset_start=-100, offset_end=100, offset_stepsize=0.1)[source]¶

Build histogram of wind directions for each year and compare to reference histogram built from data in reference years

  1. Build reference histogram of wind directions from reference years

  2. For each year: 2a: Add constant offset to wind directions, starting with offset_start 2b: Build histogram of wind directions 2c: Calculate absolute correlation between 2b and reference 2d: Continue with next offset, ending with offset_end 2e: Detect offset that yielded maximum absolute correlation with reference

Args:

measurement: Time series of wind directions in degrees hist_ref_years: List of years for building reference histogram, e.g. “[2021, 2022]” offset_start: Minimum offset in degrees to shift s offset_end: Maximum offset in degrees to shift s hist_n_bins: Number of bins for building histograms

Parameters:

  • measurement (Series)

  • replicate (Series)

  • offset_start (int)

  • offset_end (int)

  • offset_stepsize (float)

get_corrected_measurement()[source]¶
get_offset()[source]¶
diive.pkgs.corrections.offsetcorrection.remove_relativehumidity_offset(series, showplot=False)[source]¶

Correct relative humidity offset > 100%

Works for relative humidity data where maximum values should not exceed 100%.

Return type:

Series

Parameters:

  • series (Series)

  • showplot (bool)

Args:

series: Data for relative humidity variable that is corrected showplot: Show plot

Returns:

Corrected series

Example:

See examples/corrections/offsetcorrection.py for complete examples.

diive.pkgs.corrections.offsetcorrection.remove_radiation_zero_offset(series, lat, lon, utc_offset, showplot=False)[source]¶

Correct nighttime offset from all radiation data and set nighttime to zero

Works for radiation data where radiation should be zero during nighttime.

Nighttime flag is calculated and used to detect nighttime data. Then, for each radiation variable, the nighttime radiation mean is calculated for each day in the dataset. This mean is the offset by which daytime and nighttime radiation data are corrected. Finally, after the application of the offset, nighttime data are set to zero.

Return type:

Series

Parameters:

  • series (Series)

  • lat (float)

  • lon (float)

  • utc_offset (int)

  • showplot (bool)

Args:

series: Data for radiation variable that is corrected lat: Latitude of the location where radiation data were recorded lon: Longitude of the location where radiation data were recorded utc_offset: UTC offset of timestamp_index, e.g. 1 for UTC+01:00

The datetime index of the resulting Series will be in this timezone.

showplot: Show plot

Returns:

Corrected series

Example:

See examples/corrections/offsetcorrection.py for complete examples.

class diive.pkgs.corrections.offsetcorrection.WindDirOffset(winddir, hist_ref_years, offset_start=-100, offset_end=100, hist_n_bins=360)[source]¶

Bases: object

Compare yearly wind direction histograms to reference, detect offset in comparison to reference and correct wind directions for offset per year

Example:

See examples/corrections/offsetcorrection.py for complete examples.

Parameters:

  • winddir (Series)

  • hist_ref_years (list)

  • offset_start (int)

  • offset_end (int)

  • hist_n_bins (int)

__init__(winddir, hist_ref_years, offset_start=-100, offset_end=100, hist_n_bins=360)[source]¶

Build histogram of wind directions for each year and compare to reference histogram built from data in reference years

  1. Build reference histogram of wind directions from reference years

  2. For each year: 2a: Add constant offset to wind directions, starting with offset_start 2b: Build histogram of wind directions 2c: Calculate absolute correlation between 2b and reference 2d: Continue with next offset, ending with offset_end 2e: Detect offset that yielded maximum absolute correlation with reference

Args:

winddir: Time series of wind directions in degrees hist_ref_years: List of years for building reference histogram, e.g. “[2021, 2022]” offset_start: Minimum offset in degrees to shift winddir offset_end: Maximum offset in degrees to shift winddir hist_n_bins: Number of bins for building histograms

Parameters:

  • winddir (Series)

  • hist_ref_years (list)

  • offset_start (int)

  • offset_end (int)

  • hist_n_bins (int)

get_corrected_wind_directions()[source]¶
get_yearly_offsets()[source]¶

Return yearly wind direction offsets that yielded maximum absolute correlation with reference

Return type:

DataFrame
